name: Corop Solar Farm
operational_notes: OX2 acquired Corop 8 Jul 2026 from BNRG Leeson (OX2's second Australian asset after Muswellbrook). BESS scope revised on acquisition: 290 MW / 1,160 MWh (4hr) — up from prior 704 MWh spec. Solar 230 MWac. EPBC 'not controlled action' Feb 2026 (4-month approval). Construction start slipped from Q1 2026 target pending OX2 re-baseline. ~700 jobs. 1.19M solar modules.

timeline.title: OX2 acquired from BNRG Leeson
timeline.detail: OX2's second Australian asset after Muswellbrook. Deal formalised BESS scope at 290 MW / 1,160 MWh.

ownership_history.note: OX2's second AU asset after Muswellbrook

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: OX2 acquired from BNRG Leeson 8 Jul 2026 — revised BESS scope 704→1160 MWh. Construction slipped from Q1 2026 target pending OX2 re-baseline. Pre-FID at ~9 months post-award. Ownership change may accelerate FC given OX2's Nordic infrastructure-fund backing.
